text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [reply needed] Sir Richard: Rich Lang asks how to proceed with purchasing the Acer Aspire 16 AI laptop.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests adding a 'Past Presentations' button to the Presentations page with a table of contents.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests a 'Past Presentations' button on the opening title with a table of contents.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch asks about CG site updates and questions a white 'Interdisciplinary' statement, requesting it become a popup on his academic page.
- [scheduling] David Purdy: David Purdy confirms he will join the Google Meet call for a discussion.
- [scheduling] Michael Lang: Michael Lang proposed a call at 11 or 11:30 with David Purdy.
- [scheduling] David Purdy: David Purdy confirms availability for a call after missing earlier message.
- [scheduling] Michael Lang: Michael Lang proposed a quick call with David Purdy to resolve geoJSON site permission issues.
- [follow up] lang.mc+cc@gmail.com: Daily brief reminder to submit finalized geoJSON files to David Purdy.
- [no action] Andy: Newsletter-style message from Andrew Lang about urgency and awareness.
